query:
SELECT 
  id,
  deliveryCity,
  courseAmount,
  teacherFee,
  partnerFee,
  paymentDate,
  LEFT(notes, 100) as notes_preview
FROM orders 
WHERE deliveryCity IN ('天津', '武汉') 
  AND paymentDate >= '2026-01-16'
ORDER BY paymentDate DESC
LIMIT 10;
